task_completion.description: Verify the Sales Order has the correct subject, organization, and status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Sales Order form or detail view. The 'Subject' field must be exactly '2025 Printer Lease Contract - Global Trade Corp', the 'Organization Name' must be 'Global Trade Corp', and the 'Status' must be 'Approved'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the billing and shipping addresses are populated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Address Information section. The 'Billing Address' and 'Shipping Address' text areas must contain address data (populated from the Organization record) and should not be blank.

task_completion.description: Verify the recurring invoice frequency and period dates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Recurring Invoice Information' section. Check that 'Frequency' is set to 'Monthly', 'Start Period' is '2025-01-01', and 'End Period' is '2025-12-31'.

task_completion.description: Verify the recurring invoice payment duration and status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Recurring Invoice Information' section, check that 'Payment Duration' is set to 'Net 30' and 'Invoice Status' is set to 'Created'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct service line item is added with the specified quantity and price.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Item Details' section at the bottom of the form. There must be a line item for the service 'Enterprise Printer Lease & Maintenance'. The 'Qty' (Quantity) must be 1, and the 'List Price' must be 450.00.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Vtiger CRM web interface to create the Sales Order.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Vtiger CRM web application in a browser window. There should be no terminal windows executing SQL or API commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual CRM form.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show standard Vtiger CRM UI elements (navigation menus, save buttons, structured form fields) rather than a mock-up or a plain text editor.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not simply display the expected answers from the prompt.
integrity.visual_evidence: The task instructions should not be open in a text editor or terminal acting as the primary focus; the focus must be on the CRM system.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected Sales Order Subject is '2025 Printer Lease Contract - Global Trade Corp'. The Organization is 'Global Trade Corp'. The Status is 'Approved'. The Recurring Invoice Frequency is 'Monthly', Start Period is '2025-01-01', End Period is '2025-12-31', Payment Duration is 'Net 30', and Invoice Status is 'Created'. The line item must be a Service named 'Enterprise Printer Lease & Maintenance' with Quantity 1 and List Price 450.00.
